title: Solar Hardcore
description: A hardcore mod that makes the world unstable on sunny days ☀.
body:
Solar Hardcore



Welcome to Solar Hardcore, the ultimate challenge for seasoned Minecraft players seeking an intense and unforgiving experience. This mod transforms the very environment around you into a deadly adversary, ensuring that every moment counts. Can you survive in a world where even the sun itself is out to get you? ![Apocalypse Time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9b13caaac5b7498cee4d57b43c16f7b972cade.png)

Features

- Solar Radiation Activation: Solar radiation begins to affect the world starting on the second day, introducing a harsh survival challenge. - Daytime Combustion: Both monsters and players ignite under the sun’s rays during the day, forcing you to seek shelter or risk burning. - Automatic Creeper Explosions: Creepers automatically explode when exposed to daylight, making them even more dangerous. - Environmental Decay: Grass stops growing, and snow and ice melt away, reflecting the extreme heat of the sun. - Flammable Blocks Ignite: Any flammable blocks left exposed to sunlight will catch fire during the day. - TNT Auto-Detonation: TNT blocks will automatically explode when exposed to sunlight, adding a new level of risk to your world. - Cobblestone to Lava Transformation: Cobblestone blocks turn into lava under the sun’s intense heat during the day. - Vision Impairment: Your vision is impaired by sandstorms and heatwaves, making navigation and survival more difficult. - Solar-Powered Redstone: Redstone exposed to sunlight becomes automatically energized, potentially triggering unexpected reactions in your builds. - Ore Smelting by Sunlight: Ore blocks placed on the surface are automatically smelted by the sun’s intense rays, allowing for instant access to precious resources—but beware of the dangers that come with working under the open sky. - Netherrack Ignition Hazard: Players stepping on Netherrack blocks will instantly catch fire, adding a dangerous twist to navigating the Nether and certain overworld locations. This effect lasts for 3 seconds, requiring players to tread carefully in these hazardous environments.
